description: Style NoteThis season's french connection line features clutch with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.Product DetailsBlack handbag with gold hardware, has a bow detail in goldon the front with a metal claspHas a fabric inner with a zipped pocketHas a chain strapMaterial and CarePolyurethaneWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 19 cmWidth: 29 cmDepth: 4 cm
